title: funastrum hartwegii
intro: Funastrum hartwegii, also known as Toison du village or Devil's Claw, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used for medicinal purposes due to its anti-inflammatory properties, which aid in reducing pain and swelling in the body. The health benefits of Funastrum hartwegii include relief from arthritis, fibromyalgia, and other conditions associated with chronic pain. Funastrum hartwegii is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and can also be used topically to apply its medicinal properties directly to affected areas.
